task: codex auto-fix direct full-file repair mode
goal: Stop relaxed BatchFix from being blocked by patch context mismatch by writing complete replacement files directly.
assumptions: The requested behavior is for relaxed GitHub auto-fix runs to prioritize applying all review fixes over preserving patch-first diagnostics.
Protected file checks, allowed fallback prefixes, checkout correctness, and pre-push verification remain hard boundaries.
Legacy patch and retry behavior remains useful for local or strict mode tests.
risks: Full-file replacement can touch more text than a minimal SEARCH/REPLACE patch if the model over-edits.
Model output that is itself a patch must still be rejected before writing as source.
Relaxed workflow must not hide pre-push validation failures.
